ONE CONNECTED SYSTEM

Development has
more context now.

Every repository, decision, task, and agent handoff becomes a useful part of the system. cortexMind gives your team an operating layer that compounds with every change.

Repository intelligence

Turn every repository into a living map of files, relationships, decisions, and dependencies.

Durable agent memory

Give every new agent the context of the work before it, without making your team repeat itself.

Workflows that ship
